title: fraxinus × borzae
intro: Fraxinus × borzae, also known as the Fraxinus × Borzae Hybrid Ash, is a cultivated deciduous tree that results from the cross between two different species of Ash trees. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Fraxinus × borzae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Fraxinus × borzae is typically prepared in herbal form through infusions, teas, and tinctures, making it a versatile ingredient for traditional medicine and natural remedies.
